meta.title: SloerStudio — The Agentic Development Platform
meta.description: Next-generation cross-platform desktop IDE built for AI agent swarms, multi-pane terminals, and vibe coding workflows.

hero.description: SloerStudio is the operating system for AI-native builders. Voice dictation, multi-agent swarms, spatial canvases, and a flagship terminal — all in one platform.

ecosystem.title: Six products. One operating system.
ecosystem.description: Every surface in the Sloer stack is designed to work independently and compound when combined.

films.title: Cinematic product films for the Sloer stack.
films.description: The film layer should feel like a launch campaign: a dominant flagship spot, tighter secondary cuts, and presentation chrome that looks expensive instead of generic.

surfaces.title: Surfaces that compound into a real operating system.
surfaces.description: Each surface solves a specific part of the developer stack and each one is built to integrate with the others.

experience.title: Premium complexity, not lightweight shortcuts.
experience.description: This first execution batch leans into richer componentry, denser visual rhythm, stronger hierarchy, and more cinematic motion so the site immediately feels worth scaling into a serious company platform.

pricing.title: Simple plans. Serious tools.
pricing.description: Start free, grow into Studio, or lock in Enterprise for the full operating layer.

trust.title: Trust is engineered, not declared.
trust.description: The security, privacy, and governance model behind SloerStudio is designed for teams that treat infrastructure seriously.

cta.title: Start building with SloerStudio.
cta.description: Join the builders who treat AI agents as real teammates, not experimental toys.
